heading: Federal land open to hunting, fishing, and recreational shooting
label: 7912 Federal land open to hunting, fishing, and recreational shooting

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to subsection (b), Federal land shall be open to hunting, fishing, and recreational shooting, in accordance with applicable law, unless the Secretary concerned closes an area in accordance with .section 7913 of this title

children.heading: Effect of part
children.label: b Effect of part
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter opens to hunting, fishing, or recreational shooting any land that is not open to those activities as of .March 12, 2019
